Patch Set 6:

Hi Frank,

1) I think that this is generally good except for the changes to hash.c. Since this is like a library I think these functions should be exported.

2) This may be too large to make it through the landing process.

Patch Set 6:

Hi John,

Unless I'm mistaken, none of these symbols are used outside libcfs. Some are even not used outside hash.c (like cfs_hash_bd_move_locked) and could be made static.

Regarding the size, I know. But will it make a difference in timely acceptance? I may split it next year.

Patch Set 11:

(7 comments)

Thanks John. All good points, but I'd rather not remove unused code now. I prefer to peel the onion layer by layer. To find the unused functions, I'll use cppcheck (which already finds 675 of these).

We can also merge the functions you mentioned later (and I agree it should be done).

parents.subject: LU-4870 lfsck: lock old MDT-object in migrating

commit.subject: LU-5829 ptlrpc: remove unnecessary EXPORT_SYMBOL
commit.message:
LU-5829 ptlrpc: remove unnecessary EXPORT_SYMBOL

A lot of symbols don't need to be exported at all because they are
only used in the module they belong to.

Change-Id: I5dad1093f136577fa268cd7ecbebd1d660cfa8ef
Signed-off-by: frank zago <fzago@cray.com>
Reviewed-on: http://review.whamcloud.com/12510
Tested-by: Jenkins
Tested-by: Maloo <hpdd-maloo@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Dmitry Eremin <dmitry.eremin@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: John L. Hammond <john.hammond@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: James Simmons <uja.ornl@gmail.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <oleg.drokin@intel.com>
